column1: Brendan Allen has a full-time contract of employment with the Company, and serves as Managing
Director, having been promoted to this role on 1 December 2024. Brendan’s annual salary is €110,000
with pension contributions of €11,000 and a bonus of 15% of base salary depending on performance.
Brendan’s annual remuneration for the year ended 30 June 2025 was €67,460 (€93,084 2024) plus use
